caption: A man with white hair and a white beard, wearing glasses, a yellow long-sleeved shirt, and a red, white, and yellow striped scarf draped over his shoulders, stands behind a yellow podium. He is speaking in front of a stylized backdrop featuring red silhouettes of traditional buildings, green trees, and large, partially visible purple letters. Throughout the sequence, the man remains behind the podium, gesturing with his right hand and speaking. The camera remains static, focusing on his upper body. In the first frame, he looks forward with a neutral expression. By the second frame, he begins to speak. In the third frame, he is captured mid-gesture with his hand slightly raised, and in the final frame, he continues speaking while maintaining a steady gaze forward. The lighting is bright and consistent across all frames, and no text or logos are legible on the backdrop.
